text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you have some. Take half, or more if you
like—just tear off what you want.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: But... know that it's partly filled with red bean paste, then the rest of it's stuffed with mustard. See where this is going?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. So, what's it gonna be? Show me those
instincts!
